title: koeleria pohleana
intro: Koeleria pohleana is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly found in mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Koeleria pohleana include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various diseases. Koeleria pohleana can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make salves and infusions for topical application.
